L.-33004/99 AGRAHAYANA 19, 1936 e] 1956 ¼1956 dk 48½ dh /kkjk 8d }kjk iznRr ’kfDr;ksa ; dh vf/klwpuk la[;k dk-vk- 403¼v½] rkjh[k 05 ½ esa izdkf’kr gqbZ Fkh] esa ,rn+}kjk fuEufyf[kr la’ksk/ku djrh gS] vFkkZr+%& ¼pkjksVh½] vkSj 470-000 fd-eh- ¼pkjksVh½] vkSj 467-220 fd-eh- Vksy Iyktk dk voLFkku ¼pSust½ i<+k tk, Vksy Iyktk dk voLFkku ¼pSust½ i<+k tk, Vksy Iyktk dk voLFkku ¼pSust½ i<+k tk, Vksy Iyktk dk voLFkku ¼pSust½ i<+k tk, Hkkjkjkizk@13013@413@08&09@lhvks@thlh euksj ¼lwjr&nkghlj½ chvksVh] vyds’k ’kekZ] la;qqDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th December, 2014 S.O. 3123(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road, Transport and Highways bearing S.O. No. 403(E), dated 05th February, 2009, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:- Para 2 of Schedule:- The fee shall be collected at four fee plazas located at km. 297.300 (Boirach), km. 356.200 (Bhagwada), km. 420.340 (Charoti), and km. 470.000 (Khanivade). Shall be substituted as:- The fee shall be collected at four fee plazas located at km. 297.300 (Boriach), km. 356.200 (Bhagwada), km. 420.340 (Charoti) and km. 467.220 (Khaniwade). Notes:- 7. [F. No. NHAI/13013/413/08-09/CO/GC Manor (Surat-Dahisar) BOT] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. For Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) Read as Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) (iv) km. 470.000 Km. 467.220 -- 2 of 2 --
